chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5089 of 2023 Muhammad Zubair Versus D.J. Malir & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.23295/23 3. For orders on Misc. No.23296/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 13.05.2024 None present. -.-.- None is present on behalf of the petitioner. Even on the last date no one was in attendance. There is no intimation either. Petition as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
